role: primary confirmatory (B06: the one confirmatory model; Holm family lives here)

tokenizer.chat_template: NOT used -- readers run on the raw completion text exactly as annotated (teacher-forced, add_special_tokens=false), matching the annotation char offsets

splits.validation: ALL choices (sign, SAE latent, epoch, calibration)

labels.exclusions: non-{Supported,Not Supported} labels; spans starting at token 0 (no preceding state); both counted in the receipt

reader_timing.rule: entity token x_t scored from residual h_{t-1} (the immediately preceding causal position); all readers consume the SAME states; span aggregation = mean over entity tokens

sites.rationale: the SAE's trained residual site, so probe/lens/SAE read the same states
sites.head_note: hidden_states[32] is post-final-norm; native reader passes head_layer to skip re-norm (bug caught by gate G1)

attention_probe.primary_score: mean of the 3 independently trained probes (I06)

jacobian_lens.status: to fit (label-free, disjoint corpus, LongFact excluded); matrix hash recorded here at fit time
jacobian_lens.fit_recipe: jlens.fit, config committed with the fit run

sae_latent_label_selected.selection: max span-AUROC on VALIDATION labels (label-selected, NOT unsupervised -- B05); procedure-matched permuted-label null runs the same selection (G6)

heuristic_len_freq.features: entity token count + train-fold unigram log-frequency

stats.primary: probe test AUROC + paired reader-minus-probe diffs (logit_lens, jacobian_lens, sae_latent) under shared completion-clustered bootstrap (n=2000, seed 0)

execution.determinism: seeds fixed; bf16 not claimed bitwise-deterministic; tolerances reported
execution.two_stage: stage-1 scoring emits per-span scores keyed by span id with NO test-label access; stage-2 locked evaluator joins by id
execution.receipt: per-span sufficient statistics (all reader scores + labels + ids + args + seeds + revisions)
